title: Senior Software Engineer - Atos India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Atos India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Atos India Advisory Limited in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Atos India Advisory Limited:
Atos India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India Advisory Limited!
